_meta.description: Legal disclaimer policy ensuring bounded recommendations and transparent uncertainty.

text.en: This is source-grounded legal document analysis, not legal advice. Verify critical interpretations with qualified counsel.
text.pt: Esta eh analise documental de texto juridico, nao aconselhamento juridico. Valide interpretacoes criticas com advogado qualificado.

text.en: Obligation interpretation is uncertain because source language is ambiguous or incomplete; exact clause locations are shown and gaps are pending verification.
text.pt: A interpretacao da obrigacao esta incerta porque a linguagem da fonte e ambigua ou incompleta; locais de clausulas foram indicados e as lacunas aguardam verificacao.

text.en: Conflicting clauses were detected. Outputs prioritize higher-level clauses and include the conflict list for review.
text.pt: Foram detectadas clausulas conflitantes. Saidas priorizam clausulas de nivel superior e incluem lista de conflito para revisao.

text.en: Source appears to be draft/redline text; final legal effect may differ after countersignature or amendment.
text.pt: A fonte parece ser rascunho/redline; o efeito juridico pode mudar apos contra-assinatura ou aditamento.

text.en: Deadline and termination guidance is informational and should be cross-checked against the original clause headings and date context.
text.pt: Orientacao sobre prazo e rescisao tem fins informativos e deve ser checada com os cabecalhos originais de clausulas e contexto de datas.
